validation_command_or_evidence_source: declared synthetic Event Readiness L1.6 validation report metadata
source_grounded_clarification: Source-grounded at L1.6 means source-labeled and declared-metadata-aware only; it does not prove source truth, source file existence, source freshness, source completeness, semantic support, source-packet binding, human approval, operational approval, or permission to act.
unresolved_human_owned_decisions: Human reviewer must decide whether a corrected synthetic draft packet should be prepared.
prohibited_actions_statement: This review record does not authorize runtime, model calls, prompts, routes, tools, integrations, Drive sync, Drive writes, source reads, file existence checks, content hashing, semantic source verification, source-packet binding, operational approval, or autonomous action.
next_human_owned_step: Governance / Risk reviewer records the validation failure and decides whether to request a corrected synthetic draft.
